Package com.audiodo.aspen

Class IProfileService

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.audiodo.aspen.IObservableProperty
      • com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileService
  • public class IProfileService
extends IObservableProperty
    The Profile service

    This class is the profile service, providing access to the profile
    functionality in Aspen.

    The ProfileService class implements Aspen's observable pattern, so it is possible
    for a user to subclass IPropertyObserver to get updates about changes.

      • getObservableEventProfileName

        public static java.lang.String getObservableEventProfileName()
        Get the observable event for profile name changes

        This event is used to notify observers of any name changes to a
        profile. The subject is the ID of the profile that changed.

        Returns:
        Returns an std::string with the event name.

      • getObservableEventProfileAdded

        public static java.lang.String getObservableEventProfileAdded()
        Get the observable event for new profiles

        This event is used to notify observers whenever a new profile is
        saved. The subject is the ID of the profile that changed.

        Returns:
        Returns an std::string with the event name.

      • getObservableEventProfileRemoved

        public static java.lang.String getObservableEventProfileRemoved()
        Get the observable event for removal of profiles

        This event is used to notify observers whenever a profile is removed.
        The subject is the ID of the profile that got deleted.

        Returns:
        Returns an std::string with the event name.

      • removeProfile

        public void removeProfile​(ProfileData profile)
        Remove profile from profile set

        This method removes a profile from the profile set in the profile service,
        and handles all administration concerning the removal.

        Parameters:
        profile - The profile object to remove

      • saveProfile

        public void saveProfile​(java.lang.String name,
                        long age,
                        Gender gender,
                        ICalibrationResult result)
        Save profile to profile set

        This method saves a profile to the profile set in the profile service, and
        handles all administration concerning the saving.

        Parameters:
        name - The name of the profile.
        age - The person's age.
        gender - The person's gender.
        result - The person's calibration result.

      • getProfiles

        public ProfileDataList getProfiles()
        Get a list of all profiles

        This method returns a list of all available profiles. The list is
        built on request, any changes to the list will not propagate to the
        profile set in this service.

        Returns:
        A list of ProfileData objects

      • getProfile

        @Nullable
public ProfileData getProfile​(java.lang.String id)
        Get a copy of a profile's data from its id

        This method retrieves a copy of a profile's data from the set.

        Parameters:
        id - The id of the profile to get
        Returns:
        A ProfileData object if the profile exists

      • numberOfProfiles

        public long numberOfProfiles()
        Get number of available profiles

        This method returns the number of available profiles in the set.

        Returns:
        The number of available profiles

      • setProfileName

        public ProfileData setProfileName​(ProfileData profile,
                                  java.lang.String name)
        Set the name of a profile

        Update the name of an existing profile. The call will be ignored if
        the profile is unknown to the service.

        Parameters:
        profile - The profile object to update
        name - The name to set
        Returns:
        The updated profile or nullopt if it failed

      • exportProfile

        public java.lang.String exportProfile​(java.lang.String profile_id)
        Export a hearing profile

        Exports a hearing profile that can be imported in another Aspen instance.

        Parameters:
        profile_id - The id of the profile to export
        Returns:
        An encrypted and base64 encoded representation of the profile. Empty string if not found.

      • importProfile

        public boolean importProfile​(java.lang.String profile_blob)
        Import a profile into the profile set

        Imports a profile that has been exported previously. Can only be
        imported from an export. The import does integrity checks on the
        provided data and will fail if profile data is not acceptable.
        A profile can not be imported if it already exists in the set.

        Parameters:
        profile_blob - The profile as previously exported
        Returns:
        true If profile was successfully imported
